arts.ttl: Burnley v Leeds: EFL Championship – live
arts.sum: Minute-by-minute updates on the action at Turf Moor Any thoughts and comments, you can email Daniel Leeds will certainly ask some different questions of them. In particular, the three behind the striker – James, Aaronson and Solomon – are capable of causing problems, able to carry the ball, attack space and shoot. It’s a terrific blend, which is why players as talented as Willy Gnonto and Largie Ramazani are on the bench. There were signs in midweek that Burnley, owners of the best defensive record in the country, are looking to play more expansively. It may simply be that they were playing Plymouth, the bottom team, but they may also feel that in order to get one of the two automatic promotion places, more goals will be necessary. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Burnley as Daniel Farke makes key Ilia Gruev decision
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has replaced Joe Rothwell with Ilia Gruev in his Leeds United starting XI to take on Burnley in tonight's Championship clash. Sam Byram, who has been a reliable fill-in at left-back, starts in a back line of Jayden Bogle, Ethan Ampadu and Joe Rodon, who has begun every league match this season.

arts.ttl: Burnley team news vs Leeds United as Scott Parker makes one key change for crunch promotion clash
arts.sum: Scott Parker makes one key change to his Burnley side for tonight’s big promotion showdown with Leeds United

arts.ttl: Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain transfer stance emerges as Leeds United 'plot stunning deal'
arts.sum: Leeds United have been linked with a stunning move for ex-Arsenal and Liverpool midfielder Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain before the January transfer window slams shut. However, the opportunities have dried up for the 31-year-old and Oxlade-Chamberlain is believed to be keen on a transfer to return to the Premier League .

arts.ttl: “Here we go” - Emi Buendia saga finally comes to end, Leeds United finally know outcome - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Leeds United are not going to be signing Emi Buendia from Aston Villa this month, with Bayer Leverkusen agreeing a loan deal with an option to buy. Now though, that saga and any lingering hope of a sensational Leeds transfer solution has been dashed with Fabrizio Romano dropping an update that the attacking midfielder has instead opted to join Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Burnley vs Leeds United TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Leeds United will go in search of their third consecutive Championship victory when they meet promotion rivals Burnley on the road at Turf Moor tonight (8pm). Here, Leeds Live brings you all the TV information on how to follow tonight's Championship clash;

arts.ttl: Leeds United eyeing 35-time England international, Premier League duo also keen
arts.sum: Leeds United are among the clubs interested in offering Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain a route back to English football, according… The post Leeds United eyeing 35-time England international, Premier League duo also keen appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United and Sheffield United-linked forward set for Championship move after transfer twist
arts.sum: A raft of Championship clubs, including Leeds, Sheffield United, Middlesbrough and Derby County have been linked with a move for the player in recent weeks. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United miss out on ‘target’, but he could do Daniel Farke a huge favour next month
arts.sum: Leeds United were one of the many Championship clubs linked with a move to sign Louie Barry from Aston Villa, but he has instead opted to join Hull City, who have just helped the Whites’ promotion bid by beating Sheffield United. It comes after a big favour from Hull City to beat Sheffield United and Plymouth Argyle to snatch a draw at Sunderland previously this gameweek.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer makes exciting Leeds United prediction after Sheffield United and Sunderland slip-ups
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community Leeds United are in the driving seat for promotion as they prepare for their top-of-the-table clash with Burnley.
